name: It's my birthday + bot
description:
At the time I will release this (April 19th, 2025), it will be my 20th birthday, so I just thought a bot where you get one birthday wish that actually comes true in the bot world would be a funny idea.


The basic idea of the bot: it's your birthday, and you get one wish; after you blow out the candles, that wish will come true.

Also yes I know that I am making this bot early but I don't want to spend my birthday making a bot.
creator: Dallasdwd
